name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_config_blend_policy
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisConfigBlendPolicy caps accepted A4MC multi-axis gameplay targets into reviewed body-drag and pressure-center suggestions without changing runtime presets.
note: Reference surface for capped multi-axis config suggestion policy.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_gameplay_fit_candidate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisGameplayFitCandidate supplies accepted body-drag moment and pressure-center targets for the blend policy.
note: Input candidate surface for capped config suggestions.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_coefficient_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisCoefficientAcceptanceGate keeps unavailable test-runtime incomplete unbounded or sign-inconsistent coefficient sets out of blend suggestions.
note: Gate required before any blend suggestion can move away from current config.

name: drone_config_airframe_terms
value: DroneConfig supplies current bodyDragCoefficients and centerOfPressureOffsetBodyMeters values used as the blend baseline.
note: Current runtime preset baseline for audit suggestions.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live L2 force moment and pressure-center fitting used by this policy.
note: Upstream live CFD target for future calibration evidence.

name: blend_limits
